description: Full pipeline from a blog post URL to 10 platform-specific outputs
input: Repurpose this blog post into a full 10-platform content kit: https://example.com/ai-automation-trends-2026
expected_behavior: Phase 1: Extracts content via defuddle, saves source.md
Phase 2: Analyzes content to identify 3-5 core messages and key quotes

Phase 3: Generates 10 platform outputs (Twitter thread, LinkedIn post, newsletter, blog summary, YouTube Shorts script, TikTok script, Instagram carousel, email snippet, infographic brief, Slack announcement)
Phase 4: Generates hooks via hook-generator for each platform
Phase 5: Scores each output on platform compliance (length, format, hashtags) with 0-100 score
Phase 6: Saves all outputs to outputs/content-repurposing-engine-pro/{date}/ with manifest.json
success_criteria: 10 platform-specific files exist in output directory; manifest.json lists all 10 with quality scores; each output respects platform length limits

description: Batch processing of 3 articles into content kits
input: Batch repurpose these 3 articles into content kits: https://example.com/article1, https://example.com/article2, https://example.com/article3. Focus on LinkedIn and Twitter only.
expected_behavior: Each directory contains LinkedIn post and Twitter thread output files
Uses batch-agent-runner or parallel subagents for concurrent processing
Generates a batch-summary.md with cross-article themes and posting schedule recommendation
success_criteria: 3 output directories created; each contains at least LinkedIn and Twitter outputs; batch-summary.md exists with consolidated overview

description: Korean source content repurposed with bilingual output
input: 이 한국어 블로그 글을 10채널 콘텐츠 킷으로 만들어줘: https://example.com/korean-ai-article
expected_behavior: Generates platform outputs in Korean with English alternatives where appropriate
Applies sentence-polisher to all Korean text outputs
Twitter/LinkedIn posts use appropriate Korean hashtags
success_criteria: All 10 platform outputs generated in Korean; quality scores applied; Korean-specific formatting (e.g., Korean hashtags) present

description: Single-platform request should route to base content-repurposing-engine
input: Turn this article into just a LinkedIn post
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for this request
Request should route to content-repurposing-engine instead
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to content-repurposing-engine

description: Podcast repurposing should route to marketing-podcast-ops
input: I have a podcast episode recording. Can you turn it into social media content and a newsletter?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for this request
Request should route to marketing-podcast-ops instead
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to marketing-podcast-ops
